scripts.build: if [ -d programs ] && find programs -mindepth 2 -maxdepth 2 -name Cargo.toml | grep -q .; then anchor build; else echo '[solana-prediction-market] No programs/*/Cargo.toml found; skipping build'; fi
scripts.lint: if [ -d programs ] && find programs -mindepth 2 -maxdepth 2 -name Cargo.toml | grep -q .; then cargo clippy --all-targets -- -D warnings; else echo '[solana-prediction-market] No programs/*/Cargo.toml found; skipping lint'; fi
